name: Alpha BRAIN® (30 ct)
description_html:
Alpha BRAIN® helps you get in the zone and stay there. This daily nootropic is designed to support memory, focus, and mental processing speed—so you can think clearly, concentrate deeply, and perform at your best, whether you're working, creating, or tackling your to-do list.†︎

Formulated without caffeine, Alpha BRAIN® promotes alpha brain wave activity and supports acetylcholine levels, helping you tap into flow state and stay productive throughout the day. †︎

name: Alpha BRAIN® Black Label (80 ct)
description_html:
The most premium of the Alpha BRAIN® line, Black Label is a refined formula that supports mental processing speed, locked-in attention, and laser focus for high-stakes productivity. It’s our ultimate break-glass-in-case-of-emergency, must-get-stuff-done NOW formula.†︎
Alpha BRAIN® Black Label builds on the original formula with ingredients that promote alertness, mental acuity, quicker processing, greater accuracy, and brain and eye health, giving you a serious edge whether you're on the job, behind the wheel, or in front of a screen.†︎

name: Alpha BRAIN® Focus Shot - Peach (2.5 fl oz, 24 ct)
description_html:
Alpha BRAIN® Focus Shot is your go-to solution for convenient, portable mental performance support. With just one quick shot, you’ll get ingredients that promote focus, energy, and a positive mood. It’s perfect for high-pressure moments when you need to think clearly and stay cool.†︎

Featuring 50mg of caffeine, Cognizin® Citicoline, Lion’s Mane, and other nootropics, Focus Shot helps you get “in the zone” fast. No capsules, no powders— convenient, on-demand clarity in two delicious flavors.†︎

name: Alpha BRAIN® Instant - Blackberry Lemonade (30 ct)
description_html:
Alpha BRAIN® Instant delivers the same trusted formula as the original capsules in a convenient, delicious blackberry lemonade-flavored drink mix. Designed to support memory, focus, and mental speed, it’s ideal for those who prefer not to take pills and want a tasty, convenient way to stay sharp.†︎

Like the original, Alpha BRAIN® Instant helps promote the production of acetylcholine and alpha brain waves—key players in learning and focus—so you can tap into flow state and stay fully dialed in.†︎

Also available in Peach and Pineapple Punch.

name: Alpha BRAIN® Neuro Gummies (90 ct)
description_html:
Alpha BRAIN® Neuro Gummies are a tasty, citrus-flavored way to help promote focus, mental speed, and concentration, formulated with brain-supporting Omega-3 DHA and a low dose of caffeine.†︎

Designed to pair with Alpha BRAIN® capsules, these gummies offer an easy way to stack your cognitive support throughout the day. They also promote eye health and alertness, helping you stay sharp, focused, and ready to tackle what’s next.†︎

name: Alpha BRAIN® Pre-Workout - Tiger's Blood (20 Serving Tub)
description_html:
Alpha BRAIN® Pre-Workout is designed to fuel both your body and your brain, helping you go harder, longer, and with sharper focus. Whether you're lifting, running, or training for something bigger, this formula supports muscle endurance, mental sharpness, and physical energy so you can make every rep and every round count.
Powered by a purposeful blend of caffeine, amino acids, and nootropic ingredients, Alpha BRAIN® Pre-Workout promotes energy production and reduce the perception of effort, so pushing your limits feels just a little easier.†︎

name: Brain + Energy Bundle
description_html:
The Alpha BRAIN® + Shroom TECH® Sport Bundle pairs cognitive and physical performance support to help you stay sharp and go strong. Alpha BRAIN® promotes focus, memory, and mental speed, while Shroom TECH® Sport supports endurance and cellular energy for workouts or high-demand days.
This duo is designed to power both brain and body, helping you stay mentally dialed-in and physically primed during performance. Whether you're tackling a training session or a busy schedule, this bundle helps you push through with clarity and stamina.†

name: Bundle - 2x Creatine - Unflavored (30 Serving Tub)
description_html:
Stock up and save with the Creatine Bundle—featuring two tubs of the supplement Men’s Health named “A Best Creatine Supplement of 2025.” Designed to support strength, power, and lean muscle gains, this creatine monohydrate helps fuel short-burst, high-intensity workouts by aiding in the regeneration of ATP.†︎

Onnit’s Creatine is backed by research and built for results. Whether you're pushing for more reps or faster sprints, this bundle ensures you never miss a day of progress. †︎

name: Creatine - Unflavored (30 Serving Tub)
description_html:
Creatine Monohydrate is one of the most well-researched sports supplements available, trusted by athletes and gym-goers for over 30 years. It supports strength, power, and lean muscle gains by aiding in muscle protein synthesis after workouts. And Onnit’s creatine has been tested and approved by Men’s Health as a “Best Creatine Supplement of 2025.”
By helping regenerate ATP—the body’s primary energy source—creatine promotes performance in short-burst, high-intensity activities like lifting, sprinting, and martial arts. It also supports brain’s normal energy demands, offering cognitive benefits beyond the gym.†︎

name: Creatine - Unflavored (90 Serving Tub)
description_html:
ONNIT’s Creatine Monohydrate supports strength, muscle growth, and power by helping your body regenerate ATP—the primary fuel source for explosive movement and high-intensity training.† 

Our 30-serving tub was named “Best Small Container Creatine of 2025” by Men’s Health — and now, the same trusted formula comes in a larger, more convenient format. 

One tub. One scoop a day. 90 days of performance support — for athletes and lifters who never skip a rep.†

name: Grass Fed Whey Isolate Protein - Mexican Chocolate (30 Serving Tub)
description_html:
With 20 grams of fast-absorbing non-GMO whey isolate derived from the milk of grass-fed dairy cows, this protein supports muscle growth, recovery, and lean body mass—without the extra fat and carbs found in concentrate.* It's an efficient protein source for those serious about results.†︎
High in leucine, a key amino acid that helps trigger muscle protein synthesis, this formula delivers fast fuel to your muscles when they need it most. Ideal for athletes and active lifestyles, it supports quicker recovery between workouts.†︎

name: Grass Fed Whey Isolate Protein - Vanilla (30 Serving Tub)
description_html:

High in leucine, a key amino acid that helps trigger muscle protein synthesis, this formula delivers fast fuel to your muscles when they need it most. Ideal for athletes and active lifestyles, it supports quicker recovery between workouts.†︎

name: Krill Oil (60 ct)
description_html:
Onnit’s Krill Oil offers a bioavailable source of omega-3 fatty acids to support heart, brain, and joint health. Unlike traditional fish oil, it contains phospholipids for better absorption and astaxanthin, a powerful antioxidant that helps fight free radicals†
Sustainably sourced and certified by the Marine Stewardship Council, our Krill Oil comes in smaller softgels that are easier to swallow—and less likely to cause fishy burps—making it a smarter way to get your daily omega-3s.

name: MCT Oil (24 fl oz)
description_html:
MCT Oil provides fast-absorbing fats that your body can quickly convert into energy, making it a powerful fuel source for both brain and body. Sourced from coconut oil and concentrated for higher MCT content, it’s especially useful for those following a low-carb or ketogenic diet.†︎
Unlike typical fats, medium-chain triglycerides (MCTs) bypass normal digestion and go straight to the liver, where they’re quickly used for energy or converted into ketones. That means quicker fuel, better focus, and support for staying in ketosis. †︎

name: Melatonin Spray - Lavender (1 fl oz)
description_html:
Melatonin Spray is a fast, convenient way to support better sleep. This naturally occurring hormone helps regulate your internal clock and signals to your body that it's time to rest. Whether you're adjusting to time zone changes, working late shifts, or just need help winding down, melatonin can help you fall asleep faster and stay asleep longer.†︎ 
Our easy-to-use spray delivers melatonin in two delicious flavors, making nighttime supplementation simple and enjoyable. Ideal for travel or nightly use, it helps align your sleep-wake cycle.†︎

name: New MOOD® (30 ct)
description_html:
New MOOD® is designed to support your body’s natural serotonin production, promoting a calm, relaxed state of mind. With L-tryptophan and 5-HTP—the raw building blocks of serotonin—plus Vitamin B6 to help convert them, it encourages a balanced mood and a positive outlook.†︎
This formula also includes calming herbs to help you unwind and reset. Whether you're dealing with daily stress or just need help relaxing at night, New MOOD® offers gentle support for mood and relaxation. †︎

name: Plant-Based Protein - Chocolate (20 Serving Tub)
description_html:
Support strength and recovery—without the dairy. Onnit’s Plant-Based Protein combines peas and pumpkin, sunflower, and watermelon seeds to deliver a full spectrum of essential amino acids that help promote muscle growth, recovery, and body recomposition.
Unlike many plant proteins, this formula provides the key nutrients athletes need to perform and recover. It’s ideal for vegans, vegetarians, or anyone looking to reduce animal product consumption without compromising results.†︎

name: Shroom Tech® SPORT (28 ct)
description_html:
Inspired by the energy and stamina of high-altitude mountain goats, Shroom Tech® Sport harnesses the power of cordyceps mushrooms to support cellular energy and help you push for longer periods. Taken before your workout, this pre-exercise supplement promotes daily energy and endurance, so you can go faster for longer. †︎

Shroom Tech® Sport helps your body use oxygen more efficiently and produce energy at the cellular level, so you can go harder, for longer. Backed by clinical research and third-party tested for quality, it's formulated for athletes and everyday performers alike who demand results from their training. †︎

name: Total GUT HEALTH® (120 ct)
description_html:
Total GUT HEALTH® supports digestion and gut balance from multiple angles. Digestive enzymes help break down food to support nutrient absorption, while probiotics and prebiotics promote a diverse, thriving gut microbiome. Betaine HCl aids stomach acid production to support digestion, and Saccharomyces boulardii promotes healthy elimination.†︎
Your gut does more than digest—it helps maintain a healthy immune system and nutrient uptake. Total GUT HEALTH® helps maintain a healthy gut flora so your body can perform and feel its best every day. Because, let’s face it, when your gut feels off, so do you.†︎

name: Total Human + Alpha Brain Bundle
description_html:
Get Onnit’s best sellers in one powerful bundle. Alpha BRAIN® supports focus, memory, and mental speed to help you get in the zone, while Total Human® delivers convenient day and night packs with essential vitamins, minerals, herbs, and amino acids to support overall wellness.†︎
Together, they help you optimize both mind and body, boosting cognitive performance, mood, energy, and physical function. Whether you're looking to sharpen your thinking or support daily vitality, this bundle has you covered from morning to night.†︎

name: Total Human® (30 Day Supply)
description_html:
Total Human® is your all-in-one, more-than-a-multivitamin solution, with convenient day and night packs designed to support your mental and physical performance. With key vitamins, minerals, herbs, and amino acids, the Day Pack helps promote memory, focus, and cellular energy so you can stay sharp and active. †︎
When it’s time to unwind, the Night Pack supports relaxation, mood, and immune system health to help you recharge. Whether you're at your desk or on the move, Total Human® makes daily wellness simple and effective—no guesswork required.†︎

name: Total Nitric Oxide® - Harvest Fruit (20 Serving Tub)
description_html:
Total Nitric Oxide® is a powdered supplement that helps support your body’s natural production of nitric oxide (NO)—a compound critical for blood flow, nutrient delivery, and performance. Whether you're strength training or pushing through a tough cardio session, TNO aids recovery, muscle recovery, and performance by supporting circulation to working muscles.†︎

Nitric oxide is naturally produced in the body from L-arginine and L-citrulline and plays a key role in vasodilation—the widening of blood vessels. This increases oxygen and nutrient delivery while helping remove fatigue-causing metabolic waste. With carefully sourced ingredients and rigorous testing, TNO is formulated to help you train longer and recover smarter.†︎

name: Ultimate Sleep Pack
description_html:
The Ultimate Sleep Pack is your go-to bundle for rest, recovery, and relaxation. Featuring New MOOD® to help support a healthy daily stress response and promote a sense of calm, and Melatonin Spray to aid your body’s natural sleep-wake cycle, this duo helps you unwind and ease into restful sleep.†︎

 

Whether you're dealing with daily stress or looking to reset your routine, this bundle supports a smoother transition from day to night. It's the ultimate combo for feeling balanced, relaxed, and well-rested.†︎
